source.method: Stream the official run export and aggregate Ancient offers, picks, and wins from the same filtered run records.

choiceRules.sampleCohort: Each character uses the same solo A10 standard all-outcome runs for both displayed metrics.
choiceRules.pick: Each option appearance contributes one offer and each was_chosen occurrence contributes one pick.
choiceRules.pickedWinRate: Each pick is the denominator; a pick made in a winning run contributes one picked win.
choiceRules.invariant: pickedWinCount <= pickCount <= offerCount; the picked-win denominator is exactly pickCount.
choiceRules.key: Runtime matching uses the option key after the final .options. segment.
